channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Musk’s Grok accused of violating Canadian privacy laws on deepfakes
item.description: Privacy watchdog finds xAI's Grok lacks safeguards for sexualised deepfake image sharing, amid growing global scrutiny.

item.title: Israeli government mulling huge funding to expand West Bank settlement: NGO
item.description: The proposal, if passed, would mark one of the largest expansions of illegal Israeli settlements in decades.

item.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating attack on US consulate
item.description: Police say one suspect still at large after constable fatally shot during search warrant linked to consulate attack.

item.title: Two sentenced to death in Bangkok bombing
item.description: Two men were sentenced to death in the 2015 Thai Erawan shrine bombing that killed 20 people and wounded more than 100.

item.title: Pope Leo tells migrants: ‘I bow before your dignity’
item.description: Pope Leo met with migrants and NGOs at a port in Spain’s Canary Islands dubbed the ‘dock of shame’.

item.title: Drone strikes on central Sudanese city kill up to 23: NGO
item.description: Local rights group Emergency Lawyers blamed the attack on the RSF, which did not immediately claim responsibility.

item.title: Property deeds no protection for Palestinians as settler violence spreads
item.description: Israeli settlers follow Palestinian Bedouins across the West Bank, chasing them from their land.

item.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
item.description: Global growth forecast cut to 2.5 percent due to surging energy prices, inflation and borrowing costs.

item.title: Gold is now the top reserve asset. Is dollar dominance at risk?
item.description: Gold now accounts for 27% of global reserve holdings, overtaking US Treasuries as the world's largest reserve asset.

item.title: Stephen Miller’s War
item.description: Unelected and unaccountable, Stephen Miller has become one of the most powerful figures in modern US history.

item.title: Bahrain releases footage of damage caused by intercepted Iranian drones
item.description: Bahrain released video of damage in Manama after debris from intercepted Iranian drones fell in populated areas

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Ceasefire talks continue under fire
item.description: Israel expands ground operations in southern Lebanon as ceasefire efforts remain stalled.

item.title: All clear given at Pentagon following after ‘hazardous materials’ alert
item.description: Department of Defense spokesman says 'shelter-in-place order' lifted after air quality issue detected.

item.title: Trailer: Israel’s Darkest Weapon | Al Jazeera Originals
item.description: Investigation exposes decades of alleged Israeli torture and sexual violence against Palestinian detainees

item.title: Mexico vs South Africa live: World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full opening ceremony and team news coverage, ahead of our text commentary stream.

item.title: Trump calls off third night of Iran strikes after threatening Kharg Island
item.description: After saying US would hit Iran 'very hard', Trump signals possible breakthrough in ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: Israel’s Darkest Weapon | Al Jazeera Originals
item.description: Investigation exposes decades of alleged Israeli torture and sexual violence against Palestinian detainees

item.title: Somali referee banned by US to officiate European Super Cup, UEFA says
item.description: Omar Artan ​was named among match officials ​for 2026 World Cup but will miss the tournament after US refuses him entry.

item.title: Ilia Topuria vs Justin Gaethje title fight at UFC Freedom 250: All to know
item.description: Fight time, undercard, stats and how to watch as Topuria and Gaethje tussle in front of Donald Trump at the White House.

item.title: I saw Kushner’s Albania resort up close — it is an environmental disaster
item.description: The damage at Vjosa-Narta is not fake news. Bulldozers are tearing into one of Europe’s most precious wetlands.

item.title: Argentina fans denied US visas get free TVs to watch World Cup
item.description: Argentina fans denied US visas get free TVs to watch World Cup.

item.title: World chess body suspends Russia over activities in occupied-Ukraine
item.description: Russia is accused of usurping control of the game in areas of Ukraine captured by Russian forces since 2022.

item.title: Palestine Action activists could face UK ‘terror’ sentences: What we know
item.description: Four members of the Palestine Action group could be sentenced as 'terrorists' over Elbit factory raid in 2024.

item.title: Iran shuts Hormuz strait: But wasn’t it already closed?
item.description: The strait is a crucial maritime route, through which 20 percent of global oil and natural gas is shipped in peacetime.

item.title: ‘Dignity has no passport’: Pope makes appeal for migrants in Canary Islands
item.description: Pope Leo will meet with about 1,000 migrants on Friday who have braved dangerous Atlantic waters to reach Europe.
